title: athlete — permissions
description: Two audiences. Tenant plane (sanctum) — Athlete CRUD by admin / owner / hr / coach / reception / guardian (via .own scope), self-service via .own scope suffix for adult athletes. Platform plane (platform_admin) — cross-tenant read + medical-audit for compliance ops. All permissions carry the `athletes.` prefix (or `platform.athletes.` on platform audience) to align with hierarchy.md §4 audience-boundary rules. Note: this module introduces the `guardian` role via the RoleDefinition catalogue in the rbac module — the `guardian` role gets `.own` scoped read + limited write permissions (record consent, view medical for own children when consent_medical_disclosure is true).

permissions.name: athletes.viewAny.own
permissions.description: Guardian-scoped listing — narrows to athletes with an active AthleteGuardian row where user_id = current_user_id.

permissions.name: athletes.view.own
permissions.description: Self-view for adult athletes (user_id = current_user_id) OR guardian-view for their assigned children.

permissions.name: athletes.create
permissions.description: Create Athlete row. Consumes athlete_slot; welcome notification; create audit trail.

permissions.name: athletes.update.own
permissions.description: Self-update for adult athletes — limited fields (preferred_name, pronouns, height_cm, weight_kg, dominant_hand, primary_language, profile_photo_url). Also open to guardians for their assigned minors (same limited field set — never date_of_birth, never status).

permissions.name: athletes.delete
permissions.description: Soft-delete an Athlete row. Precondition: status='archived'.

permissions.name: athletes.link-user
permissions.description: Bind a User to an existing Athlete. One-shot (post-first-link the user_id is immutable). Admin + owner + HR — never guardian (guardians request the link via a workflow, they don't self-execute).

permissions.name: athletes.pause
permissions.description: Transition status active ↔ paused. Non-terminal.

permissions.name: athletes.graduate
permissions.description: Soft-terminal — kept for alumni relations.

permissions.name: athletes.graduate.cascade
permissions.description: Additional permission for cascade=true on the graduate route (closes active enrollments in one transaction).

permissions.name: athletes.withdraw
permissions.description: Terminal — parent-initiated exit path.

permissions.name: athletes.withdraw.own
permissions.description: Guardian-initiated withdrawal — a parent can withdraw their own child. Athletes 18+ can withdraw themselves.

permissions.name: athletes.archive
permissions.description: Terminal archive + restore.

permissions.name: athletes.view.medical
permissions.description: Read medical_* fields. Without this, the redactor strips medical fields from egress.

permissions.name: athletes.view.medical.own
permissions.description: Self-view of own medical (adult athletes) OR guardian-view of assigned minor children's medical WHEN athlete.consent_medical_disclosure=true.

permissions.name: athletes.view.medical.coach
permissions.description: Coach-scoped access — a coach sees medical for athletes on their teams WHEN athlete.consent_medical_disclosure=true. Enforced by the MedicalDisclosureGate.

permissions.name: athletes.manage.medical
permissions.description: Write medical_* fields. Distinct from athletes.update — the observer refuses writes without this even if the caller has athletes.update. Requires athlete_medical_tracking entitlement.

permissions.name: athletes.view.emergency_contact
permissions.description: Read emergency_contact_* fields.

permissions.name: athletes.manage.emergency_contact
permissions.description: Write emergency_contact_* fields.

permissions.name: athletes.manage.emergency_contact.own
permissions.description: Guardian-managed for their assigned minors, self-managed for adult athletes.

permissions.name: athletes.view.consents
permissions.description: Read consent snapshot + history.

permissions.name: athletes.manage.consents
permissions.description: Record + revoke consents. For minors, must be an authorised guardian.

permissions.name: athletes.manage.consents.own
permissions.description: Guardians manage consents for their assigned minors; adult athletes manage their own consents.

permissions.name: athletes.audit.medical
permissions.description: Compliance export — read the athlete_medical_history audit stream for a tenant.

permissions.name: platform.athletes.audit-medical
permissions.description: Support-tooling medical audit. Emits signed CSV. Super_admin only with two-person approval.
